name: Slow Cooker Cantonese Sweet and Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lean pork shoulder, cut into strips
2 cups pineapple chunks in juice (reserve juice)
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
1. Place pork strips in Crock-Pot.
2. Add green pepper and sliced onion.
3. In a bowl, mix brown sugar and cornstarch.
4. Mix together 1 cup reserved pineapple juice, the vinegar, water, soy sauce, and salt; blend until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture over meat and vegetables.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
7. One hour before serving, add pineapple chunks and stir into meat and sauce.
8. Serve over chow mein noodles.
